mxCell.value: Inference Mapping: Industrial Case Studies CT&DT-Galgotias | Batch No:5 | Task 10

01 | Renewable Energy (Rural)

Problem: High transmission costs for last-mile grid.
Inference: Decentralized community-owned solar micro-grids with pay-as-you-go financial models are essential for inclusive adoption.

02 | Smart Mfg in MSMEs

Problem: High cost barriers to Industry 4.0.
Inference: Low-cost modular IoT retrofits combined with human-centered worker upskilling ensures adoption without massive capital investment.

03 | Fluid Machinery Failure

Problem: Unexpected downtime and safety hazards.
Inference: AI-driven predictive maintenance combined with Digital Twins prevents failure. Engineers need actionable alerts, not raw data overload.

04 | Robots in Welding

Problem: Hazards in confined/toxic spaces.
Inference: Human-robot collaboration (Cobots) with Computer Vision inspection reduces defects. Retraining workers as supervisors alleviates job anxiety.

05 | Material Handling

Problem: Inefficient transit causing productivity loss.
Inference: Automated Guided Vehicles (AGVs) must be paired with ergonomic workflow redesign to reduce worker fatigue and optimize system-level flow.

06 | Bio-materials in 3D Printing

Problem: E-waste from conventional plastics.
Inference: PLA/PHA polymers enable zero-waste additive manufacturing. Adoption requires co-designing the entire circular product lifecycle.

07 | Orthopedics Bio-med

Problem: Poor fit of standard surgical implants.
Inference: Patient-specific 3D-printed titanium implants drastically improve outcomes. Personalization is the core design principle.

08 | AR in Inventory

Problem: Error-prone manual barcode scanning.
Inference: AR smart glasses reduce picking errors by 40%. Success relies on ergonomic design (weight, battery) tailored for factory floor conditions.

09 | Digital Twin for Rotors

Problem: Unpredictable power plant shutdowns.
Inference: Continuous virtual health monitoring. Trust is built through transparent, explainable AI 3D dashboards for operators.

10 | Supply Chain (LPG/Agro)

Problem: Inefficient rural last-mile delivery.
Inference: AI route optimization + SMS tracking. Design must accommodate low-connectivity and low-literacy users (offline-first design).

11 | Railway Ticketing

Problem: Scalability and rural accessibility issues.
Inference: Dynamic AI seat allocation. System must employ Universal Design (USSD/Aadhaar) to serve both tech-savvy and first-time digital users.

12 | Process Plant Drones

Problem: Hazardous and slow manual inspection.
Inference: Autonomous drone swarms with LiDAR. Policy design (DGCA compliance) is equally as critical as technical drone capabilities.
CT&DT-Galgotias-Batch No:5 | Task 10 — Inference Mapping | Student: Lakshya Kumar Gupta 🐙 GitHub: https://github.com/Luxy-code/CTDT-Galgotias-Batch5-Assignments
